title: CEM Configuration
description: Schema for CEM (Custom Elements Manifest) configuration files

projectDir.description: Root directory of the project. Resolved automatically from the config file location when not set.

configFile.description: Path to the config file. Normally resolved automatically; set only when overriding via CLI.

packageName.description: Override the package name used in the generated manifest. Defaults to the name field in package.json.

sourceControlRootUrl.description: Base URL for linking manifest entries to source code (e.g. https://github.com/org/repo/blob/main).

verbose.description: Deprecated: use logLevel instead. Equivalent to logLevel: info.

logLevel.description: Minimum log level. Overrides verbose if both are set.

additionalPackages.description: Extra packages to load manifests from (npm:, jsr:, or URL specifiers). Useful for consuming design system elements without local source.

generate.description: Controls how cem generates custom-elements.json manifests from source files.

files.description: Glob patterns for source files cem scans for custom element definitions. At least one pattern is required for generation.

exclude.description: Glob patterns for files to skip during generation. By default, **/*.d.ts files are excluded.

noDefaultExcludes.description: When true, disables the default **/*.d.ts exclusion pattern, so declaration files are also scanned.

output.description: Output path for the generated manifest. Falls back to the customElements field in package.json, or stdout if neither is set.

designTokens.description: Merges DTCG design token metadata (descriptions, syntax, defaults) into matching CSS custom properties in the manifest.

spec.description: Path or specifier (npm:, jsr:, URL) to a DTCG design tokens JSON file. Token names are matched to CSS custom property names in the manifest.

prefix.description: Prefix prepended to token names when matching against CSS custom properties (e.g. 'rh' matches token 'color-brand' to '--rh-color-brand').

demoDiscovery.description: Discovers demo HTML files and associates them with elements in the manifest. Demos can declare associations via frontmatter, URL pattern matching, or content-based tag detection.

fileGlob.description: Glob pattern for finding demo HTML files. When empty, demo discovery is skipped entirely.

urlPattern.description: WHATWG URLPattern for extracting parameters from demo file paths. Parameter values are matched against element tag names to infer associations.

urlTemplate.description: Go template for generating demo URLs from matched parameters (e.g. '/demos/{{.tagName}}/').

serve.description: Configures the cem dev server for previewing components with live reload, import maps, and source transforms.

port.description: Port the dev server listens on. Use 0 for automatic port assignment.

openBrowser.description: Automatically open a browser tab when the dev server starts.

importMap.description: Controls the import map injected into served HTML pages, enabling bare specifier resolution (e.g. import 'lit').

generate.description: When true, auto-generates an import map from node_modules package.json exports. Generated entries are merged with overrides, where overrides take precedence.

overrideFile.description: Path to a JSON file with manual import map overrides (standard { imports: {}, scopes: {} } format). Merged with auto-generated map.

override.description: Inline import map overrides. Same format and merge behavior as overrideFile, but specified directly in config.

scopes.description: Scope-specific import overrides, keyed by URL prefix.

transforms.description: On-the-fly source transforms applied when the dev server serves files.

typescript.description: Transforms .ts files to JavaScript on-the-fly. Uses tsconfig.json for compiler options when available.

enabled.description: Enable TypeScript-to-JavaScript transformation for served .ts files.

target.description: ECMAScript target version for TypeScript output. Defaults to es2022.

css.description: Transforms CSS files into JavaScript modules for import with import attributes. Only files matching include patterns are transformed.

enabled.description: Enable CSS-to-JS module transformation. Files must also match include patterns to be transformed.

include.description: Glob patterns for CSS files to transform. No files are transformed unless at least one include pattern is specified.

exclude.description: Glob patterns for CSS files to skip. Excludes take precedence over includes.

urlRewrites.description: Maps request URLs to different file paths. Uses WHATWG URLPattern for matching and Go templates for rewriting. First match wins.

urlTemplate.description: Go template producing the rewritten path (e.g. '/src/{{.path}}').

demos.description: Controls how component demos are rendered in the dev server UI.

rendering.description: Demo rendering mode: light (default, no encapsulation), shadow (Shadow DOM boundary), iframe (full isolation), chromeless (no dev server chrome).

mcp.description: Settings for the MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that provides custom element context to AI tools.

maxDescriptionLength.description: Truncate element descriptions to this many characters in MCP responses. Defaults to 2000.

health.description: Configures cem health checks that score manifest completeness and documentation quality.

failBelow.description: Minimum health score percentage. The health command exits with an error if the score falls below this threshold.

disable.description: Health check rule IDs to skip. Available rules: description, attributes, slots, css, events, demos.

export.description: Named framework export configurations. Each key is an export name, and its value defines how to generate framework-specific wrappers from the manifest.

output.description: Directory where generated framework wrapper files are written.

stripPrefix.description: Prefix to remove from element tag names when generating wrapper names.

packageName.description: Package name used in generated import statements.

moduleName.description: Module name used in generated wrapper code.
